title: DungeonDodge+
description: A utility mod for a server called DungeonDodge, DungeonDodge+ adds several features to enhance dungeon exploration, including quality of life improvements for a better gameplay experience!
body:
# Overview
DungeonDodge+ is a utility mod for the Dungeon Dodge server, offering various quality-of-life improvements and optimizations to enhance your gameplay experience.

# Features

- **Music Player:** Plays background music in dungeons with skip and stop buttons.
- **Singleplayer Toggle:** Singleplayer button now toggles to the Play DungeonDodge button.
- **Wiki Documentation:** Guides on updating the enchantments list and adding custom songs.
- **Update Checker:** In-game update notifications and a one-click update button.
- **Visual Effects Options:** Disable effects like blindness, invisibility, darkness, and nausea.
- **Full Bright Mode:** Enhances visibility during dungeon runs.
- **In-Game Menu:** A DungeonDodge+ menu in the bottom right corner of the screen or in the player inventory.
- **Customizable Hotkeys:** Set your own keys for quick dungeon actions.
- **Auto Functions:** Auto-leave and auto-restart options for dungeons.
- **Mana Bar & FPS Tracker:** Keep track of your mana and game performance.
- **Rainbow Enchantments:** Enjoy dynamic enchantment visuals.
- **Notifications:** Room cleared and fish caught notifications.
- **Enhanced Fishing Features:** Hide other fishing bobbers (with particle hiding) and block other players’ fishing lines/bobbers.
- **Player Controls:** Delete key to hide players and customizable colors for teammate/enemy highlighters.
- **Dynamic Water Color:** Change water color based on the dungeon.
- **Combat & Utility Tools:** 
  - Sheep addition.
  - Essence Counter.
  - Teammate Highlighter & Health Display.
  - Enemy Highlighter.
  - Difficulty Announcer.
- **Quality-of-Life Features:**
  - Automatic Pet Hider.
  - Toggleable CustomModelData display.
  - Open Config keybind.
  - Quick Wardrobe (for Hero and above).
  - Ability Cooldown Message hiders.
  - Essence Finder.
  - Blessing Finder.
  - Mod Menu update checker.


# Requirements
- Cloth Config (please check the specific version when downloading)
- Fabric API (please check the specific version when downloading)

# Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is using this mod bannable?**  
A: No – this mod is approved by the server owner, so you can use it safely.

**Q: Can I use this mod on other servers?**  
A: It is designed specifically for Dungeon Dodge, and using it on other servers is not recommended.
